pageContext.name: Pegasus
pageContext.description: Ray Harryhausen was frequently called on to re-create creatures from ancient mythology. Pegasus was a creation of the gods, a horse with the ability to fly with large eagle-like wings.  Sideshow and Star Ace are proud to present the Pegasus Statue, which has been brought to life in a sixth scale polyresin format with detachable wings. Posed as if striding through the air, Pegasus is sculpted by the renowned artisans at Kaibutsuya, each piece meticulously hand-painted.  Pegasus ships with a polyresin display base with a nameplate.
